name: aaja-live
description: Production-ready anonymous real-time video chat platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "yarn workspace client dev" "yarn workspace server dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace client build && yarn workspace server build
scripts.test: yarn workspace client test && yarn workspace server test
scripts.lint: yarn workspace client lint && yarn workspace server lint
scripts.type-check: yarn workspace client type-check && yarn workspace server type-check
